examples: The primary presenting clinical signs of urolithiasis in horses with cystic and urethral calculi include hematuria, pollakiuria and dysuria.
Urolithiasis is a common disorder with a high recurrence rate.
Dog urolithiasis is one of the common diseases of the pets service.
Stones of the urinary tract which are also called kidney stones, nephrolithiasis or urolithiasis are common.
